name: Base Auxiliary Building: Secret Space
description: An auxiliary building on the Kerplunk-a-tron Windmill Base shaped like a giant fish with its mouth wide open. Its thick roof and walls together create a reliable barrier that provides excellent sound- and light-proofing effects for the interior. A design like this one is particularly suitable for use as a lab requiring light- and soundproofing or as a vault for the safekeeping of valuable items.
